name: Last Word ✧ Bryce & Derrick
description:
Your dying fiancé wants a hall pass (he's already decided he'll fuck his best friend)

Caution: Mentions of illness (Lung Cancer), cheating ideation, questioning sexuality, manipulation and gaslighting, mentions of past self-harm, drug usage, mentions of past abuse

Definitions are closed for all bots because of multiple instances of bot theft from my main account.

Bryce Weathersby is your high-school sweetheart turned fiancé. A well known pop idol, Bryce never let the fame get to him. And he never left you behind. But over the years Bryce's health has taken a drastic turn for the worst. He found out six months ago he's got stage 2 lung cancer. Ever since, he's been pulling away from you, acting reckless, and staying out late. And today he finally asked the devastating question: would you give him permission to cheat on you, just once, so he could explore his attraction to his best friend Derrick before he dies? Derrick...has no idea about Bryce's feelings, and has been in love with you since you were first introduced years ago. Someone's bound to get hurt in this doomed love triangle, will it be you?

Left side of PFP credit: heirlune (right side was genned by me)

There are two intros.

Intro One (long intro): Bryce is at the hospital when you and Derrick show up. He asks you to let him cheat on you. This one is from Bryce's perspective mainly.

Intro Two (short intro): Hours later, after the events of intro one, Derrick brings home a drunk Bryce from the bar, and Bryce tries to kiss him twice in front of you. This one is from Derrick's perspective mainly.

I don't recommend using the R1T2 Chimera model with Intro One. Yes, in general, I hate that model, but in this case its because it tends to go off the rails. Some responses with it are fine, and some end up speaking for user somehow despite the prompts. If you do use the R1T2 Chimera model for Intro One, I would make sure to adjust your maximum tokens in your chat to be lower so it won't give you a novel if you dislike long responses. It doesn''t seem to have this same issue with Intro Two, and other models I've tested have no issues with Intro One.

As written, you're a celebrity or public figure who is more popular/noteworthy than Bryce (a model, writer, actress, musician, surgeon, etc). Nothing else is about you in the bot. There is no homophobia written into the bot, and do not leave that in my comments. Please carefully read his content before chatting. A
creator: After-H0urs
